mapper.sql: id, flow_name, flow_code, business_type, description, status, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_flow_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_flow_template WHERE flow_code = #{flowCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM sys_flow_template WHERE deleted = 0
AND (flow_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR flow_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_flow_template (flow_name, flow_code, business_type, description, status, sort) VALUES (#{flowName}, #{flowCode}, #{businessType}, #{description}, #{status}, #{sort})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_flow_template
flow_name = #{flowName}, flow_code = #{flowCode}, business_type = #{businessType}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_flow_template SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_flow_template SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
